name: Bean and Sausage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Rinse frozen lima beans with cold water to separate them.
3. Mix lima, baked, kidney, and northern beans, onion, and sausage in an ungreased 2-1/2-quart casserole.
4. Mix remaining ingredients; stir into bean mixture.
5. Cover and bake for 40 to 50 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
